questions: Photoshop diye ki ki kora jay
answers: Adobe Photoshop is the world's most popular image editing software. It's used for photo retouching, digital art, graphic design, compositing, and much more.
Photoshop holo Adobe er image editing software — photo edit, background remove, poster banano, digital painting shob kora jay. Creative field er must-have tool.
To learn Photoshop, start with layers, selection tools, masks, and adjustment layers. YouTube tutorials and Adobe's own learning resources are great. Practice with real projects to improve.
Photoshop is available through Adobe Creative Cloud subscription. It excels at raster image editing while Lightroom focuses on photo organization and non-destructive color correction.
